steps.expected: Condensed sticky header appears at top with token name and price
steps.observed: Sticky header appeared and remained pinned below navbar

steps.action: Scroll deeper (~1200px total) and inspect sticky text via DOM
steps.expected: Header still shows token name + concrete price text (not dash-only)
steps.observed: Sticky token text observed as `CCASH$0.0000` at top=72

evidence.network: Resource timing showed repeated API 429s on /market, /depth, /candles during run; sticky header still rendered token + numeric price

assertions.title: Link pills use surface2 background and rounded20

steps.action: Inspect computed styles for `Website`/`Explorer` link pills
steps.expected: background rgb(31,31,31), border-radius 20px, font-size 17px, color rgba(255,255,255,0.65)
steps.observed: background rgb(31,31,31) and border-radius 20px matched, but font-size was 16px and color was rgb(255,255,255)

evidence.network: Repeated API 429s observed in resource timings (non-blocking for style read)

assertions.issues: Typography/color mismatch persists: observed 16px white text instead of required 17px neutral2.

assertions.title: CTA button uses buttonLabel2 (17px), rounded20, 56px min-height

steps.action: Inspect computed styles for `Connect Wallet` CTA button
steps.observed: border-radius 20px and min-height 56px matched, but font-size was 16px and font-weight was 400

evidence.network: Repeated API 429s observed in resource timings (non-blocking for CTA style read)

assertions.issues: CTA typography mismatch persists: 16px/400 instead of required 17px/medium.

assertions.title: Table cells use body4 (13px)

steps.action: Navigate to Transactions and inspect tbody rows
steps.expected: At least one real data row exists so td typography can be measured
steps.observed: Only empty-state row present: `No recent transactions / Trades will appear here in real-time`

steps.action: Retry with reload/open + wait (2s then 10s) and re-check rows
steps.expected: Data row appears after reasonable wait/reload attempts
steps.observed: After 3 attempts, rowCount remained 1 with dataRowCount 0 (empty-state only)

evidence.network: Resource timing repeatedly returned 429 for API requests (e.g., /market, /depth, /candles), and no transaction data rows materialized

assertions.issues: Blocked: actual transaction data rows were unavailable, so body4/13px could not be measured on real data cells.

frictions.description: During validation, API fetches repeatedly returned 429 in browser resource timing data, causing unstable/empty data surfaces.
frictions.resolution: Worked around by retrying page open/reload and waiting up to 10 seconds; style assertions remained testable but TXN-002 row-data check remained blocked.

blockers.description: No real transaction rows rendered after reasonable retries, so TXN-002 data-cell typography could not be validated.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: 3 attempts total (initial check + open/reload with waits of 2s and 10s); table stayed in empty-state only.

summary: Validated 4 rerun assertions: 1 pass (HEADER-005), 2 fail (ABOUT-004, SWAP-005), 1 blocked (TXN-002 due to absent data rows after retries).
